evals.expected_output: Plain what/why, classical roots (data/supply-chain integrity), and relationships — the controls that address it, the personas impacted, the components where it manifests — with ids linked.

Lists its relationships: addressing controls, impacted personas (and/or lifecycle) with ids
Read-only; does not edit the entry
